title: Elbaf’s Children Become Targets
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Colon, Unknown person #7, Ripley, Unknown person #8, Zoro, Nami as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Colon
dialogue.text: Colon!! Don't cause a scene!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But that was a solid first strike!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ehe he he he! Ah!! Mom, Mate-San made all your favorites!!

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: Whaaaat?! you're a mom, Ripley-chan?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least you're teaching your son the old ways!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't you gonna tell him to apologize for that sneak attack?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you know my father's a human, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wow! Lingonberries!! I'm so happy!!)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He used to be a pirate, and he didn't fear anyone, not even the warriors of Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Your Dad's human?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My husband's much younger than me.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our marriage is more informal because of that age gap. He always said it'd be weird to make it official...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...since he'd be the only one to ever grow old.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is he for real?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WoaAH!! Even the library is awesome here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: These books are Huuugge!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Luffy!! I want to talk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...with Saul a little longer. I'll meet you at the feast later.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dereski shi shi shi! Those guys party for three days straight, so we'll have plenty of time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm staying too!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry about me either, I'm going to hang around and get my resident permit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Me too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ow! I also got some business around here! This entire kingdom is on an Adam tree!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the same kind of wood which the sunny is made of!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah... there are a few Adam trees around the world, but the age of this one is off the charts!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Treasure Tree Adam

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna learn more about the treasure tree while we're here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No worries, we'll just go on ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I gotta eat before I starve!! I'm at my limit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Umm, I've got something for you all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What is it, Gerd?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YohohoHo!! This is excellent! I look more like a warrior now, don't I?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn right, brook!! I'm feeling stronger already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say, how come you've got clothes our size?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I like making human clothes for fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But that's all it is, I swear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Kyaaaah!! They're so cute!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They're wonderful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm glad you like them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's surprisingly comfortable.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, we'll meet you guys at the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: See you later!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
